note: Baseline scores estimated from Claude public benchmark data and our problem calibration. Update with real Claude API runs when available.

methodology.humaneval: Claude Sonnet 4.x scores ~88% on HumanEval (TypeScript variant calibrated -2% vs Python)
methodology.mbpp: Claude Sonnet 4.x scores ~90% on MBPP-style basic problems
methodology.bashbench: Estimated from terminal task benchmarks — strong bash generation
methodology.swebench: Claude Sonnet 4.x SWE-bench Verified ~50-60% — using 60% for our simpler 10-task set
methodology.process: Estimated — Claude uses Read before Edit, Bash for verification consistently
